_meta.description: H100 Stage-1 launch convergence record (attempts + blocker resolution chain + live pod)

convergence.final_status: LIVE+BOOTSTRAPPED — pod mqljodjb5pqpk4 H100 80GB · hexa shim installed · 4 sister repos linked · drill_breakthrough_runner PASS 4/4 (cross_match=4/4, fixpoint=3/4) · awaiting AN11(a) emitter for Stage-2 cascade

attempts.name: anima-stage1-alm-r13
attempts.outcome: FAIL — runpodctl --gpu-type flag deprecated (runpodctl 1.x uses --gpuType). No kickoff command delivered to pod.

attempts.name: anima-stage1-alm-r13
attempts.outcome: FAIL — SSH succeeded · pod running H100 80GB HBM3 · hexa-lang cloned inside pod · BUT self/native/hexa_v2 is ARM64 (Mac) binary · 'Exec format error' on Linux x86_64. No Linux pre-built hexa binary in hexa-lang repo.

attempts.name: anima-stage1-alm-r13
attempts.outcome: LIVE — Stage-1 pod bootstrapped successfully. All 5 convergence issues resolved prior to retry.
attempts.env_highlights: ANIMA_STAGE=1 · ROADMAP_ENTRY=9 · HEXA_STRICT=1 · ALM_CONFIG=config/alm_r13_v2_config.json · TORCH_COMPILE=1 · bf16 · GRAD_ACCUM=4 · CKPT_INTERVAL=25 · IDLE_KILL_MIN=5

issues.root_cause: Manifest stored kickoff commands used runpodctl 0.x camelCase flags (--gpuType / --imageName / --secureCloud / --startSSH / --cost / --env K=V). runpodctl 1.x rejects with 'unknown flag'.
issues.impact: All 5 stored kickoff commands (stage1 + stage2_p1..p4) non-executable.
issues.resolution: anima 62889155 — migrate all 5 to kebab-case (--gpu-id / --image / --cloud-type SECURE / --container-disk-in-gb / --volume-in-gb / --volume-mount-path / --env JSON object). --cost removed (no 1.x equivalent; guard lives in abort_thresholds). --startSSH removed (SSH default on).

issues.root_cause: hexa-lang repo self/native/hexa_v2 baseline binary is Mac ARM64. No install.sh / Linux bootstrap. Linux parity (O75) flagged ENV_BLOCKED.
issues.impact: All H100 pod kickoffs impossible until Linux hexa binary is available (4-repo cross_repo_blocker).
issues.resolution: hexa-lang 1fdc0100 — Linux x86_64 static musl 5.5MB ELF committed to build/hexa_v2_linux_x86_64.

issues.root_cause: Legacy hexa_v2 transpiler leaks bare `now()` / `push(arr,v)` / `setenv` / `exec_capture` identifiers into generated .c as hexa_call{0,1,2} operands — runtime has only hx_*-prefixed globals.
issues.impact: AOT-compiled anima tools fail clang link. anima required sed-fixup workaround (tool/build_fixup_native.bash) for every native build.
issues.resolution: hexa-lang 373696e7 — runtime.c terminal #define shim extended (hxa-004 ext): `now → timestamp`, `push → hx_push` (new TAG_FN + _w_push wrapper around hexa_array_push). anima 2f6c8e60 — doc §1 RESOLVED + workaround marked OBSOLETE.

issues.root_cause: tool/anima_cli/compute.hexa parsed `runpodctl pod list` as table (tail -n +2 | wc -l) when 1.x emits JSON array. Counted 10 JSON lines for 1 pod.
issues.impact: `anima compute status` reported 'pods: 10 running' when only 1 pod was live — misleading operator display and incorrect `stop all` target extraction.
issues.resolution: anima 69b5bdb6 — switch to `jq 'length'` for count and `jq -r '.[].id'` for stop-all id extraction.

issues.root_cause: state/h100_stage1_launch_state.json final_status = 'ABORTED — pod bootstrap blocker (hexa baseline binary architecture mismatch)' lingered after successful attempt 3 launch.
issues.impact: `anima compute status` / downstream dashboards displayed a blocker message that no longer applied.
issues.resolution: anima a200b387 — attempt_3 appended, final_status → LIVE, blocker_diagnosis marked RESOLVED. This file now restructured under `convergence` attr (schema v2).

issues.root_cause: pod_bootstrap_sequence referenced `https://<R2>/hexa-linux-x86_64` placeholder. Binary existed locally but not in R2.
issues.impact: Pod could not fetch hexa binary to self-bootstrap.
issues.resolution: anima 55bdad56 — rclone copy to r2:anima-models/bin/hexa_v2_linux_x86_64 + tool/fetch_hexa_binary_url.bash (7-day presigned URL on demand, anima-models is private) + bootstrap_sequence rewritten with 3-step flow.

issues.root_cause: runpod/pytorch:2.4.0-py3.11-cuda12.4.1-devel-ubuntu22.04 ships gcc but not clang. hexa runtime macro block uses some clang-specific flags and stdlib include paths under -Wno-trigraphs + -fbracket-depth=4096.
issues.impact: hexa wrapper's compile step failed with 'clang: command not found' on first invocation.
issues.resolution: In-pod `apt-get update && apt-get install -y clang` (one-shot, captured into pod-side cache). Future pods either install on demand or build a custom image with clang pre-installed (landmine captured).

issues.root_cause: hexa-lang build/hexa_v2_linux_x86_64 is the *transpiler* only (hexa-cc). Mac ships a Rust driver binary at /opt/homebrew/bin/hexa that does transpile → clang → exec for `hexa run <file>`; no Linux equivalent exists upstream.
issues.impact: First pod invocation `hexa run tool/drill_breakthrough_runner.hexa ...` was parsed by hexa-cc as `input=run, output=tool/drill_breakthrough_runner.hexa`, *overwriting the source file* with transpiled C.
issues.resolution: (a) git restore tool/drill_breakthrough_runner.hexa. (b) Rename the transpiler to /usr/local/bin/hexa_v2. (c) Install /usr/local/bin/hexa — a bash wrapper that accepts `hexa run <file>` and `hexa <file>` (Mac CLI compat) and does transpile → clang -I /workspace/hexa-lang/self → exec, with content-hash cache at /tmp/hexa_cache. Recipe captured in pod_bootstrap_sequence for re-use on future pods. Upstream: track as hexa-lang landmine — ship a Linux driver or a canonical shim script.

issues.root_cause: anima tooling resolves canonical paths like drill_breakthrough_criteria via config/drill_ext_resolver.json, which expands ~ → $HOME and expects ~/core/nexus/bench/... ~/core/hexa-lang/self/... etc. Fresh pod had /root/core empty.
issues.impact: `hexa run tool/drill_ext_resolve.hexa drill_breakthrough_criteria` exited non-zero, which made drill_breakthrough_runner report 'not resolved'.
issues.resolution: mkdir -p /root/core; git clone nexus + airgenome; symlink /workspace/anima + /workspace/hexa-lang into /root/core/. All 4 sister repos now resolvable from $HOME/core/. Captured as step in pod_bootstrap_sequence.

issues.root_cause: drill_breakthrough_runner's `ext_resolve` uses exec("hexa tool/drill_ext_resolve.hexa <ref>") — implicit `run` (Mac CLI convention). Initial wrapper only accepted explicit `hexa run <file>`, so the exec'd shell saw the wrapper's usage-message on stderr and reported 'not resolved'.
issues.impact: drill_breakthrough_runner refused to start even with prereqs satisfied.
issues.resolution: Wrapper amended: `if first arg ends in .hexa and exists, rewrite argv to `run <file> …`. Verified with `cd /root/core/anima && hexa tool/drill_ext_resolve.hexa drill_breakthrough_criteria` → prints resolved absolute path.

issues.root_cause: drill_breakthrough_runner defaults to strict_audit=true; refuses to run without state/drill_criteria_audit.jsonl. Fresh pod has no audit log (genesis).
issues.impact: First drill attempt exited with 'audit: missing … — refusing to run (strict)'.
issues.resolution: Use `--all-seeds` flag which sets strict_audit=false (genesis mode). Captured in pod_bootstrap_sequence. Eventually Stage-2 workflow should seed the audit log from an approved baseline run.

stage1_drill_breakthrough.source: pod mqljodjb5pqpk4 (/root/core/anima) — first live drill output on Linux x86_64 H100

pending_items.root_cause: Stage-2 ready_conditions[0] is 'Stage-1 AN11(a) live PASS'. drill_breakthrough_results.json (PASS 4/4) is necessary but not sufficient — the manifest looks for a specific AN11(a) artifact that drill_breakthrough_runner does not emit directly.
pending_items.impact: manifest regen still reads Stage-2 pass=3/4 / verdict=NOT_READY after drill PASS on pod. Stage-2 cascade remains blocked.
pending_items.next_step: Identify the AN11(a) emitter (likely a separate tool that consumes drill_breakthrough_results.json + alm_r13 state) and run it on the pod. OR if AN11(a) is expected as a field within drill_breakthrough_results, add it to the runner emit.

issues_resolved_p1.root_cause: pod_bootstrap_sequence referenced `https://<R2>/hexa-linux-x86_64` placeholder. hexa-lang build/hexa_v2_linux_x86_64 existed locally but had not been uploaded to R2.
issues_resolved_p1.impact: Pod mqljodjb5pqpk4 was running but couldn't auto-bootstrap until binary was fetchable.
issues_resolved_p1.resolution: anima <pending-commit> — uploaded to r2:anima-models/bin/hexa_v2_linux_x86_64 (sha256=3ff995fc8b68e3a5b9e46a803a269e03204ff0b439a668a6dfadc58acc01d496, 5.32 MiB). Added tool/fetch_hexa_binary_url.bash helper that emits 7-day presigned R2 URL on demand (anima-models is a private bucket, so presigned URLs avoid leaking long-lived R2 creds into pod env). Updated pod_bootstrap_sequence with operator-side url-gen + pod-side curl + sha256sum -c verification.

resolution_commits: hexa-lang 1fdc0100 — Linux x86_64 static musl 5.5MB ELF committed
anima 2f6c8e60 — hxa-004 ext RESOLVED doc + workaround OBSOLETE
anima 69b5bdb6 — compute CLI JSON list parser
anima a200b387 — launch state LIVE + session handoff convergence record
anima 0f455e67 — _meta.convergence schema v2 migration + v1 fallback readers
anima 55bdad56 — R2 binary upload + fetch_hexa_binary_url.bash + bootstrap sequence finalized
anima <pending-commit> — pod bootstrap live (I7 clang install, I8 hexa shim, I9 sister repo link, I10 implicit run, I11 genesis drill) + drill PASS 4/4 artifact sync'd back
